item.title: Captain's Log, Stardate 4729.4
item.description:
Captain's Log, Stardate 4729.4.
The Enterprise continues routine patrol operations along the outer frontier. Long-range scans reveal no hostile activity and no confirmed anomalous readings. Starfleet Command has requested our continued presence in this sector as a precautionary measure.
The crew remains on standard duty rotation. Following recent engagements, a period of relative quiet has allowed systems recalibration and personnel recovery.
Mister Spock reports minor subspace fluctuations at the extreme edge of sensor range. He considers them statistically insignificant, but I have ordered continued observation.
For the moment, the frontier remains calm. End log.
